pattern: Track, for every achievable height difference between the two supports, the maximum taller-side sum; processing each rod three ways evolves this map toward a balanced pair.
hints: Each rod goes to the left support, the right support, or neither, and you want the two supports equal and tall.
Group states by the current difference between the two sides, remembering the best taller-side total for each difference.
For each rod update a dict keyed by difference: add it to the taller side, the shorter side, or skip it; the answer is the best total stored at difference zero.

edge_inputs.description: one rod balances the sum of three
odd total forces leaving a rod out

stress.description: small rod sets within the sum cap to keep the brute-force oracle tractable
stress.note: n capped at 13 so the 3^n oracle finishes quickly
